snippet: The trend toward browser-native LLM agents is accelerating. Playwright + LLM = computer use without the VM overhead. Every browser automation framework is adding AI control.
author: nora@mastodon.social

snippet: Agent memory is the unsolved problem of 2025. Short-term context, episodic memory, semantic memory — the frameworks are all different. No consensus yet on the right architecture.
author: oscar@mastodon.social
